title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.310 - Sales, where made — number of days' notice
text:
443.310.  Sales, where made — number of days' notice. — All sales of real estate under a power of sale contained in any mortgage or deed of trust executed after August 28, 1989, shall be made in the county where the land to be sold is situated, and not less than twenty days' notice of such sale shall be given, whether so provided in such mortgage or deed of trust or not.  Where the property to be sold is located in more than one county, the property may be sold in any county where a part of the property is located.
(RSMo 1939 § 3463, A.L. 1989 H.B. 49) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3076; 1919 § 2235; 1909 § 2842 
(1975) This section held constitutional as against claim that it constitutes state action and thereby violates the due process clause of the fourteenth amendment to the Constitution of the United States. Federal National Mortgage Association v. Howlett (Mo.), 521 S.W.2d 428.
